title: Inter-chroma with cross-type referencing and constrained reference region
abstract: A method for using cross-component prediction for video coding is provided. A video coder receives data to be encoded or decoded as a current block of pixels of a current picture of a video. The video coder identifies a predefined region that is applicable to the current block. The video coder derives a list of candidates that can be inherited by the current block, the list comprising cross-component prediction models from positions outside the predefined region. The video coder selects one or more cross-component models from the list of candidates. The video coder encodes or decodes the current block by applying the selected one or more cross-component models to reconstructed or predicted first component of the current block to generate a predictor for a second component of the current block.
